---
title: "Restoring native freshwater crayfish habitat in invaded lake ecosystems"
thesis-title: "Restoring native freshwater crayfish habitat in invaded lake ecosystems"
author: "Olivier V. Raven"
date: "2026"
title-block-style: none
---

```{r}
#| label: global-setup
#| include: false
.bg <- if (knitr::is_latex_output()) "#FFFCF0" else "white"
knitr::opts_chunk$set(dev.args = list(background = .bg))
library(ggplot2)
theme_update(
  plot.background  = element_rect(fill = .bg, colour = NA),
  panel.background = element_rect(fill = .bg, colour = NA)
)
```

{{< include index.qmd >}}
{{< include title_page.qmd >}}
{{< include abstract.qmd >}}
{{< include acknowledgements.qmd >}}
{{< include 01_general_intro/index.qmd >}}
{{< include 02_koura_fear/index.qmd >}}
{{< include 03_koura_shoreline_habitats/index.qmd >}}
{{< include 04_koura_mesocosm/index.qmd >}}
{{< include 05_stone_piles_rotoiti/index.qmd >}}
{{< include 06_synthesis/index.qmd >}}
{{< include 07_general_conclusion/index.qmd >}}
{{< include references.qmd >}}
{{< include appendices.qmd >}}
